message:
feat(decision): add confidence-bounded automation controls for --robot (Plan §2/§8.1)

Implements RuntimeRobotConstraints with CLI override support:
- --min-posterior, --max-blast-radius, --max-kills flags
- --require-known-signature, --exclude-categories controls
- Policy/CLI merge uses more restrictive value for safety
- ConstraintChecker tracks accumulated blast radius and kill count
- Full explainability with ConstraintViolation details

Includes 17 unit tests and fixes pre-existing test compilation errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
